section.heading: Appropriate congressional committees defined
section.chapeau: In this subchapter, the term “appropriate congressional committees” means—

paragraph.content: the Committee on Finance and the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs of the Senate; and
the Committee on Ways and Means and the Committee on Homeland Security of the House of Representatives.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: This subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title I of Pub. L. 114–125, Feb. 24, 2016, 130 Stat. 127, which is classified principally to this subchapter. For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Tables.
